examples: They think it'll do some good untying him.
I am still waiting for the untying knot between our life.
If anyone asks you, 'Why are you untying it?' tell him, 'The Lord needs it.
In other words, Mr Jospin had better start untying those knots pretty fast.
Some demonstrators tried to block the canal by untying speedboats and setting them adrift while others sought to interrupt car ferry traffic.
